title: Round Trip Heart
overview: 26-year-old Hachiko Hojo works as a train attendant, selling items on a cart. She's good at her job, but she lacks self confidence. One day, she meets a movie producer. They decide to visit tourist attractions in Hakone, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan. Hachiko Hojo looks back upon her life along the way.

trailers.title: 『ロマンス』特報映像
trailers.channel_name: 東京テアトル公式チャンネル
